headline: Here Are Monday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: APA Corporation, Cheniere Energy, Crown Castle, Hut 8, MongoDB, Red Rock Resorts, Super Micro Computer, Terawulf, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading higher after President Trump signalled that talks with Iran are progressing positively, as we get ready to start another trading week, with the same issues that have dragged the stock market down for four consecutive weeks still in place. headline: Wells Fargo Downgrades Crown Castle to Equal-Weight, Lowers Price Target to $85
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Eric Luebchow   downgrades Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) from Overweight to Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $90 to $85.
